meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-02 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A full night to reset — 7h32 (score 85), up +1 on yesterday, off a 22:39 lights-out. Deep 1h50, light 3h35 and a strong REM 2h07, with only 19m awake — both deep and REM landed high, so the architecture matched the duration. The autonomic read is recovering: HRV nudged back up to 39 (+2 vs yesterday, though still −2 under the 7-day baseline of 41) and RHR sits at 56 (+1), with morning stress low at 20. After the mid-week HRV dip this is a step back toward baseline rather than a full reset, so read the tank as solid-but-not-brimming. Today's plan is a squat session — fine on this recovery: warm up thoroughly and keep the top sets crisp and controlled rather than chasing maximal loads on a mid-40s HRV week. The full night has you set for a quality session.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Puna noć za reset — 7h32 (ocjena 85), +1 na jučer, uz lijeganje u 22:39. Duboki 1h50, lagani 3h35 i snažan REM 2h07, uz samo 19m budnosti — i duboki i REM su visoki, pa struktura sna prati trajanje. Autonomni pokazatelj se oporavlja: HRV se vratio na 39 (+2 vs jučer, iako još −2 ispod 7-dnevne osnovice 41), a RHR je na 56 (+1), uz nizak jutarnji stres 20. Nakon sredotjednog pada HRV-a ovo je korak natrag prema osnovici, a ne potpuni reset — pa čitaj spremnik kao solidan, ali ne prepun. Današnji plan je trening čučnja — u redu uz ovaj oporavak: dobro se zagrij i drži gornje serije oštre i kontrolirane, bez lova na maksimalna opterećenja u tjednu s HRV-om u sredini 40-ih. Puna noć te je pripremila za kvalitetnu sesiju.
